name: Mini-Chimis
recipeIngredient: 4 cups homemade mexican meat mix, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat 2 inches of oil to 375°F.
2. Place a won-ton wrapper on the table diagonally (like a diamond).
3. Spoon 1 heaping teaspoonful of meat mixture into the lower corner of the wrapper.
4. Fold the lower point up over the filling, then fold the sides in.
5. Moisten the top corner with a little water and roll the won-ton into a cylinder.
6. Repeat steps 2-5 with remaining meat filling and wrappers.
7. Lower several mini-chimi rolls at a time into the hot oil.
8. Fry for 3-4 minutes, or until golden brown, turning as needed to brown evenly.
9. Drain on paper towels.
10. Serve with guacamole and salsa.
Makes 120.
